tagged_types.name: Instance

subtypes.name: Nonterminal_ID
subtypes.code: subtype Nonterminal_ID is Token.Token_ID range Token.Token_ID'Succ (Token.Last_Terminal) .. Token.Token_ID'Last;

subprograms.name: Column
subprograms.code: function Column (Parser : in Instance) return Natural

subprograms.name: End_Of_Text
subprograms.code: function End_Of_Text (Parser : in Instance) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Line
subprograms.code: function Line (Parser : in Instance) return Natural

subprograms.name: Set_Text_Feeder
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Text_Feeder (Parser : in out Instance; Feeder : in Text_Feeder.Text_Feeder_Ptr)

formals.name: Tokenizer
formals.code: with package Tokenizer is new Token.Analyzer;
